title: Add Async Workflows & Transactional Email to Next.js
description: Route for adding event-driven background jobs and transactional email to a Next.js app — covering job orchestration, email templates, and delivery.

steps.description: Set up Inngest for event-driven background jobs and cron schedules
Build type-safe, reusable email templates with React Email
Connect Resend as the email delivery provider, send from Inngest step functions
Optionally add Upstash Redis for rate-limiting and deduplication of email sends
